metadata.method_name: JRN Multiplicative Compounding + Entropy vs Probe Architecture
metadata.description: Tests multiplicative compounding of JRN along multi-hop chains and compares entropy-based vs GBM-probe-based architecture guidance on rel-f1

examples.input: {"analysis": "Part A - Individual JRN values for all 13 FK joins across 3 driver tasks + local proxy", "method": "GBM probe (LightGBM n_estimators=200, 3 seeds) + local proxy-target JRN", "joins_tested": 13, "tasks_tested": 3}

examples.input: {"analysis": "Part A - Multiplicative compounding of JRN along multi-hop chains", "hypothesis": "Chain JRN = product of individual JRNs", "metric": "R^2 between predicted (product) and measured chain JRN", "reference": "rel-stack R^2 = 0.83"}

{"analysis": "Part B - Entropy-based JRN proxy vs GBM probe correlation", "method": "Conditional entropy reduction H(Y)-H(Y|agg_features) with 10-bin discretization", "metric": "Spearman rho between entropy ranking and probe ranking"}

{"analysis": "Part B - Architecture comparison: 4 configs x 3 tasks x 3 seeds", "configs": ["probe_guided", "entropy_guided", "uniform_mean", "uniform_rich"], "model": "LightGBM n_estimators=300, max_depth=8"}
{"analysis": "Overall experiment summary", "experiment": "JRN Multiplicative Compounding + Entropy vs Probe"}
examples.output: {"title": "JRN Multiplicative Compounding on rel-f1 + Entropy vs Probe Architecture", "dataset": "rel-f1 (Formula 1)", "num_tables": 9, "num_joins": 13, "num_chains_tested": 21, "tasks_used": ["rel-f1/driver-dnf", "rel-f1/driver-top3", "rel-f1/driver-position"], "part_a_r_squared": -17.921354417691884, "part_a_pearson_r": 0.042304997289562406, "part_a_spearman_rho": 0.04161251892882395, "part_b_entropy_spearman": -0.06831213788184777, "part_b_best_config": "uniform_rich", "part_b_wins": {"probe_guided": 1, "entropy_guided": 0, "uniform_mean": 0, "uniform_rich": 2}, "runtime_seconds": 48.71744751930237}
